page: UpCloud GPU-20xCPU-256GB-2xL4 is a GPU-accelerated server configured with 20 shared vCPUs on the x86_64 architecture and 256.0 GB of system memory. This configuration yields a high memory-to-core ratio of 12.8 GB per vCPU. The server utilizes the KVM hypervisor for virtualization.

The primary feature of this server is its graphics acceleration hardware, consisting of two NVIDIA L4 GPUs from the Ada Lovelace family, delivering a combined total of 48 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage, meaning storage resources must be attached externally. It includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Given the shared CPU allocation combined with dual enterprise-grade NVIDIA L4 GPUs and a substantial 256.0 GB memory footprint, this server offers a specialized resource profile. It is designed for workloads that require significant GPU acceleration and large memory capacity but do not demand dedicated, non-shared CPU cores. Appropriate workloads include machine learning inference, data science jobs, video processing, and GPU-accelerated rendering.
description: UpCloud GPU-20xCPU-256GB-2xL4 is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 20 shared x86_64 vCPUs and 256.0 GB of system memory, providing 12.8 GB of RAM per core. Virtualized via KVM, the server is equipped with two NVIDIA L4 GPUs from the Ada Lovelace architecture, providing a total of 48 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage, requiring external storage attachments, and comes with one complimentary public IPv4 address. The combination of dual GPUs and a large memory capacity makes this server suitable for memory-intensive GPU workloads such as machine learning inference, data science, and parallel processing tasks that do not require dedicated CPU resources.
og_description: UpCloud GPU-20xCPU-256GB-2xL4 is a KVM-based server featuring 20 shared vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and two NVIDIA L4 GPUs with 48 GB total VRAM, designed for GPU-accelerated and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: UpCloud GPU-20xCPU-256GB-2xL4 features 20 shared vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and two NVIDIA L4 GPUs with 48 GB VRAM for GPU-accelerated workloads.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated virtual server featuring dual NVIDIA L4 GPUs and 256 GB of memory for parallel computing and machine learning.

256.0 GB of system memory providing 12.8 GB per core
